queries.question: What type of election and start date are associated with each political reporter?
queries.sql: SELECT Elections.election_type, Elections.start_date  from Political_Reporters_Elections join Elections on Political_Reporters_Elections.election_id = Elections.id join Political_Reporters on Political_Reporters_Elections.reporter_id = Political_Reporters.id   GROUP BY Political_Reporters_Elections.election_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Political_Reporters_Elections.reporter_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Political_Reporters)

queries.question: What type of election and start date are associated with each political reporter?
queries.sql: select political_reporters.name , elections.election_type , elections.start_date from Political_Reporters_Elections join Elections on Political_Reporters_Elections.election_id = Elections.id join Political_Reporters on Political_Reporters_Elections.reporter_id = Political_Reporters.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?election_type ?start_date WHERE {
  ?political_reporters_elections a :Political_Reporters_Elections .
  ?elections a :Elections .
  ?political_reporters_elections p:hasElections ?elections .
  ?political_reporters a :Political_Reporters .
  ?political_reporters_elections p:hasPolitical_Reporters ?political_reporters .
  ?political_reporters p:name ?name .
  ?elections p:election_type ?election_type .
  ?elections p:start_date ?start_date .
}

queries.question: For each reporter, list the end date of elections they cover.
queries.sql: select political_reporters.name , elections.end_date from Political_Reporters_Elections join Elections on Political_Reporters_Elections.election_id = Elections.id join Political_Reporters on Political_Reporters_Elections.reporter_id = Political_Reporters.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?end_date WHERE {
  ?political_reporters_elections a :Political_Reporters_Elections .
  ?elections a :Elections .
  ?political_reporters_elections p:hasElections ?elections .
  ?political_reporters a :Political_Reporters .
  ?political_reporters_elections p:hasPolitical_Reporters ?political_reporters .
  ?political_reporters p:name ?name .
  ?elections p:end_date ?end_date .
}

queries.question: For every political reporter list all of the election start dates.
queries.sql: select political_reporters.name , elections.start_date from Political_Reporters_Elections join Elections on Political_Reporters_Elections.election_id = Elections.id join Political_Reporters on Political_Reporters_Elections.reporter_id = Political_Reporters.id

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?start_date WHERE {
  ?political_reporters_elections a :Political_Reporters_Elections .
  ?elections a :Elections .
  ?political_reporters_elections p:hasElections ?elections .
  ?political_reporters a :Political_Reporters .
  ?political_reporters_elections p:hasPolitical_Reporters ?political_reporters .
  ?political_reporters p:name ?name .
  ?elections p:start_date ?start_date .

queries.question: Give me the election types, including start and end dates, that are common to all reporters
queries.sql: SELECT Elections.election_type, Elections.start_date, Elections.end_date  from Political_Reporters_Elections join Elections on Political_Reporters_Elections.election_id = Elections.id join Political_Reporters on Political_Reporters_Elections.reporter_id = Political_Reporters.id   GROUP BY Political_Reporters_Elections.election_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Political_Reporters_Elections.reporter_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Political_Reporters)

queries.question: What are the end dates of elections all reporters equally cover?
queries.sql: SELECT Elections.end_date  from Political_Reporters_Elections join Elections on Political_Reporters_Elections.election_id = Elections.id join Political_Reporters on Political_Reporters_Elections.reporter_id = Political_Reporters.id   GROUP BY Political_Reporters_Elections.election_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Political_Reporters_Elections.reporter_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Political_Reporters)

queries.question: List all the election start dates for every political reporter.
queries.sql: SELECT Elections.start_date  from Political_Reporters_Elections join Elections on Political_Reporters_Elections.election_id = Elections.id join Political_Reporters on Political_Reporters_Elections.reporter_id = Political_Reporters.id   GROUP BY Political_Reporters_Elections.election_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Political_Reporters_Elections.reporter_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Political_Reporters)

queries.question: What elections do all political reporters cover together?
queries.sql: SELECT Elections.election_type  from Political_Reporters_Elections join Elections on Political_Reporters_Elections.election_id = Elections.id join Political_Reporters on Political_Reporters_Elections.reporter_id = Political_Reporters.id   GROUP BY Political_Reporters_Elections.election_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Political_Reporters_Elections.reporter_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Political_Reporters)

queries.question: For each reporter, give me a list of all the election types, plus the start and end dates.
queries.sql: select political_reporters.name , elections.election_type , elections.start_date , elections.end_date from Political_Reporters_Elections join Elections on Political_Reporters_Elections.election_id = Elections.id join Political_Reporters on Political_Reporters_Elections.reporter_id = Political_Reporters.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?election_type ?start_date ?end_date WHERE {
  ?political_reporters_elections a :Political_Reporters_Elections .
  ?elections a :Elections .
  ?political_reporters_elections p:hasElections ?elections .
  ?political_reporters a :Political_Reporters .
  ?political_reporters_elections p:hasPolitical_Reporters ?political_reporters .
  ?political_reporters p:name ?name .

  ?elections p:start_date ?start_date .
  ?elections p:end_date ?end_date .
}
